scripts.deploy:hosting:dev: set -a && . ./.env.development && set +a && nuxt generate && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:backoffice
scripts.deploy:hosting:prod: set -a && . ./.env.production && set +a && nuxt generate && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:backoffice
scripts.deploy:backoffice:dev: set -a && . ./.env.development && set +a && nuxt generate && npm --prefix functions/public-api run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:backoffice,functions:public-api,firestore:indexes
scripts.deploy:backoffice:prod: set -a && . ./.env.production && set +a && nuxt generate && npm --prefix functions/public-api run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:backoffice,functions:public-api,firestore:indexes,firestore:rules,storage
